steps.title: Find the contextual signal
steps.content: The shortcoming was a myopic focus on a few countries. Later, researchers gained new access to data from South America and Eastern Europe — that fixes/reduces the geographic narrowness. The blank names that improvement.

steps.title: Match the word
steps.content:
"Mitigate" means to make less severe — exactly what new data did to the geographic narrowness.

(A) "validate" = confirm (wrong direction). (B) "presuppose" = assume in advance. (C) "categorize" = sort, doesn't fix anything.

That matches Choice D — mitigate.
